title: crotalaria barkae subsp. cordisepala
intro: Crotalaria barkae subsp. cordisepala is a plant species native to certain regions, belonging to the Fabaceae family and commonly referred to as a type of crotalaria. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria barkae subsp. cordisepala include its potential to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations often involve the use of its leaves and roots, typically dried or made into infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
